_comment: This is the reference schema for all scenario JSON files. Copy this structure for every scenario you create.

input_data.earnings_summary: Apple reported Q1 FY2025 results that exceeded analyst expectations...
input_data.macro_context: Federal Reserve held rates steady at 4.25-4.5%. Consumer spending remained resilient. Tech sector outperforming broader market YTD. Strong dollar creating headwinds for international revenue.

key_risk_factors: China market revenue declining for third consecutive quarter
Services revenue growth rate decelerating from 20% to 14%
iPhone unit sales below expectations despite revenue beat
Gross margin guidance for Q2 below current quarter
Regulatory pressure on App Store in EU
missed_signals: Supply chain diversification to India ahead of schedule
Apple Intelligence features driving upgrade cycle earlier than expected
